main.prompt_resolved: [i]"Ok, kiddo. What's best? Damage or protection?"[/i]

common.prompt_resolved:
[i]"Yeah, I feel ya. A shoot first, ask questions later kinda cat, huh?

Here, take this…"[/i]

rare.prompt_resolved:
[i]"Hell yeah! Hit 'em where it hurts!

Here. Don't say I never did nothin' for ya..."[/i]

common.prompt_resolved:
[i]"A cat who likes to take a punch, huh? Sicko…

This is a judgement-free zone, though... So here."[/i]

rare.prompt_resolved: [i]"So you like gettin' hit, huh? Well, whatever floats your boat, kiddo… Here."[/i]

main.prompt_resolved: [i]"What's best? The element of surprise or intimidation?"[/i]

common.prompt_resolved:
[i]"The old sucker punch! Yeah, I like ya, kid…

{catname} gets an extra turn at start of the next battle.

rare.prompt_resolved:

main.prompt_resolved: I got one for ya. What's best? Scabs or cuts?

rare.prompt_resolved: Heck kid, you'll need tough skin out there, but that's a bit excessive tho. You do you, kiddo.

common.prompt_resolved: This kiddo's lookin' to start somethin'! Save it for the alley! Here. It's not much, but you can take my backup slice.

rare.prompt_resolved: Dang, that's a mean stabby you got. But we'z friends tho, right? Here, take this. Should help.

main.prompt_resolved:
A small fetus floats before {catname} with an inquisitive look on its face.

Its inky black figure feels familiar somehow, but {catname} can't remember why.

reward.prompt_resolved:
{catname} feels a relentless pull in the back of {his} mind like an itch that must be scratched.

{He} must... not... flee...

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} approaches the fetus inquisitively...

It pulls off a part of itself and attaches it onto {catname}'s skin!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} attempts to communicate with the strange hovering fetus.

It smirks and pulls out an even smaller fetus and throws it at {catname}!

common.prompt_resolved: The fetus starts screaming at {catname}, going on incoherently about something that makes no sense to {him}.

rare.prompt_resolved:
The strange fetus starts rambling on angrily about something incoherent to {catname}.

This whole experience feels oddly familiar like a bad dream {he} keeps having over and over...

good.prompt_resolved: Something about the strange fetus feels offputting to {catname} so {he} leaves it alone.

reward.prompt_resolved: Something about the strange fetus feels offputting to {catname} so {he} leaves it alone.

main.prompt_resolved:
{catname} finds a dark cave in the ground.

{He} can smell the musky odor of a large animal, perhaps resting within the den.

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} enters the den and finds a sleepy bear and befriends it!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} finds a strange glowing bear within the den. It saunters out and greets {him} with a very warm and furry hug.

{catname} feels {his} body shift as it takes on a bear-like appearance!

common.prompt_resolved: A large angry bear comes charging out as {catname} approaches the den!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} enters the dimly lit den and pokes around...

The party hears a terrifying roar and {catname} sprints out of the cave, terrified, with a massive glowing bear in hot pursuit!

good.prompt_resolved:
{catname} stays clear of the ominous den.

Best to not awaken whatever is sleeping inside!

main.prompt_resolved:
{catname} finds a curious looking white rabbit.

It stares at {him} with bright red eyes...

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} licks the rabbit on the ear and rubs its belly.

The rabbit, perhaps confused at the odd gesture, barfs up a pile of bones.

{catname} didn't think rabbits were carnivores but apparently this one is?

rare.prompt_resolved:
The rabbit looks angrily at {catname} as {he} approaches, but warms up to {him} after a lot of kisses.

The rabbit seems a bit temperamental, but it tags along as a friend regardless!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} tries to tame the wild rabbit but it viciously bites {him}!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} tries to befriend the rabbit, but it becomes enraged!

The white rabbit begins foaming at the mouth and charges the party at blinding speed!

common.prompt_resolved: The rabbit leads {catname} to a secret stash of coins!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} follows the white rabbit down into a hole where it leads {him} to a secret treasure stash!

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} follows the rabbit down into a burrow where it suddenly tears into {him} with its teeth!

rare.prompt_resolved:
Following the white rabbit down into its den, {catname} suddenly finds {himself} surrounded by corpses of numerous cats...

Realizing {his} mistake, {catname} turns to leave but it is too late!

good.prompt_resolved: There's a suspicious look in the rabbit's eyes and {catname} isn't having any of it.

main.prompt_resolved: {catname} finds a mysterious machine with paper sticking out of it.

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} tries to get the machine working by hitting it but nothing happens.

{catname} tries again but with significantly more fervor and obliterates it.

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} finds a switch at the back and turns it on.

It makes a series of loud beeps and mechanical sounds...

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} tries pushing the buttons and sticks {his} claws into various holes...

{catname} howls in fright as electricity arcs from the machine and stuns {him}!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} pushes various buttons and gives the machine a good whack.

It purrs to life with loud angry sounding beeps!

good.prompt_resolved:
{catname} opts to leave the weird machine alone.

{He}'s not sure what the machine does, but paper doesn't sound very useful.

main.prompt_resolved: {catname} sees before {him} a writhing mass of parasites in the form of a headless body...

good.prompt_resolved:
The writhing mass tears a parasite off {catname} and absorbs it into itself...

Glorg is pleased!

bad.prompt_resolved:
The writhing mass tears a parasite off {catname} and absorbs it into itself...

Nothing else seems to happen.

common.prompt_resolved: {catname} strikes the mass of parasites and saves two maggots that were trapped inside!

rare.prompt_resolved: {catname} attacks the writhing mass, scattering parasites onto the floor around {him}...

common.prompt_resolved:
{catname} strikes the strange body.

When {he} does so, a parasite from within the mass latches onto {him}!

rare.prompt_resolved:
{catname} dives at the writhing mass, attacking with {his} paws and teeth...

{He} sinks into the amorphous body, becoming covered in parasites!

good.prompt_resolved: {catname} steers clear of the strange amorphous creature.
